GenAiFunction.description: Lists available Salesforce report types. Use this as the FIRST step when building any report. Pass a keyword to filter results (e.g., "Opportunity" or "Case"). The returned apiName values are what you pass to Get Report Type Columns and Create Salesforce Report. Do not guess report type names — always call this action to discover them.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: List Report Types
